info.name: Student Path — Parent Transport API (/api)
info.description:
## Setup

- Set `base_url` (e.g. `http://localhost:8000`).
- Run **Public auth → verify-otp** to fill `token`.

## Auth

OTP is **login-only** (`users.phone`). Required JSON **`type_user`**: `guardian`, `student`, or `driver` (same on send-otp and verify-otp). See `docs/API_V1_PARENT_TRANSPORT.md`.

## Route groups

- **Public (no Bearer):** `POST /api/auth/send-otp`, `verify-otp`, `GET /api/support/info`, `GET /api/support/categories`, `POST /api/webhooks/qicard`, `GET|POST /api/wallet/payments/qicard/finish`.
- **Bearer (`token`):** parent transport, legacy `transactions` / `notifications` / `haveNewMessages`, `POST /api/support/complaint`, `user/*`, `bus/*`, `org/*`.

## Variables

Parent: `student_id`, `trip_id`, `district_id`, `trip_request_id`, `absence_id`, `place_id`, `notification_id`. Org staff: `org_school_id`, `org_driver_id`, `org_student_id`, `org_guardian_id`, `org_trip_id`.

item.name: Public — Support
item.description: No Bearer token required.

item.name: Public — QiCard
item.description: Webhook: Qi Card server callback (no Bearer). Finish: browser redirect after payment.

item.name: POST /api/webhooks/qicard
item.description: Replace body with the signed payload from your Qi Card integration.

item.name: GET /api/transactions (legacy flat list)
item.description: Legacy envelope `{ success, data[], msg }`. Paginated wallet ledger remains **GET /api/wallet/transactions**.

item.name: POST /api/wallet/recharge
item.description: Optional header `Idempotency-Key` or body `idempotency_key`. Repeats return 200 with same balance. Returns 403 when QiCard is enabled and QI_CARD_BLOCK_DIRECT_RECHARGE=true.

item.name: POST /api/wallet/payments/qicard/init
item.description: Requires QI_CARD_* env and QI_CARD_ENABLED=true. Open data.form_url in a WebView; Qi Card will hit POST /api/webhooks/qicard and redirect to /api/wallet/payments/qicard/finish.

item.name: GET /api/meta/absence-reasons
item.description: Picker codes: `medical`, `travel`, `family`, `other` with EN/AR labels.

item.name: GET /api/students/{id}/attendance-schedule
item.description: Monthly presence/absence/late summary + calendar + recent events (mobile attendance screen).

item.name: GET /api/students/{id}/daily-timeline
item.description: Daily 4-milestone trip timeline (mobile الجدول الزمني screen).

item.name: POST /api/trip-tracking/topics/subscribe
item.description: Subscribe FCM tokens to trip_{id} topic. Register FCM token first via POST /api/user/fcm-token.

item.name: PUT /api/trip-requests/{id}
item.description: Only when `status` is `pending`.

item.name: PATCH /api/trip-requests/{id}
item.description: Same rules as PUT; only when `status` is `pending`.

item.name: DELETE /api/trip-requests/{id}
item.description: Only when `status` is `pending`. Use cancel for non-destructive workflow.

item.name: Parent — Absences
item.description: Student must be on an active transport route with an active driver. POST resolves `driver_id`, notifies driver + school, marks trip roster absent. See also `postman/Absences.postman_collection.json`.

item.name: POST /api/absences
item.description: Reason enum: `medical`, `travel`, `family`, `other` (from GET /api/meta/absence-reasons). 422 if student has no subscribed driver.

item.name: DELETE /api/profile
item.description: Permanently deletes the user and revokes tokens (same as `/api/user/profile` DELETE).

item.name: GET /api/notifications (legacy flat list)
item.description: Legacy `{ success, data[], msg }` with `time_ago`, `is_read`. For paginated API use **GET /api/in-app-notifications**.

item.name: POST /api/user/fcm-token
item.description: Register device FCM token after login. See docs/FCM.md.

item.name: DELETE /api/user/fcm-token
item.description: Remove token on logout. See docs/FCM.md.

item.name: Support (auth)
item.description: Bearer required. `category_id` must match an `id` from GET /api/support/categories.

item.name: User — Legacy profile & extras
item.description: Staff/driver paths under `/api/user/...` (distinct from parent `GET /api/profile`).

item.name: PUT /api/user/settings/notifications
item.description: Per-user push toggles. See docs/FCM.md.

item.name: Bus
item.description: Authenticated bus registration for the current user.

item.name: Org — Schools
item.description: Staff CRUD. Mutations may require admin role per controller.

item.name: Org — Trips
item.description: `GET /api/org/trips/history` is registered before `{trip}`.
